creator: Janky.Jay@FreeBSD.org
text:
Previous PR for same update is a goof. My apologies. It was wrongfully submitted as a shar.

Changed path to better fit FreeBSD's default BIND chroot environment.

Changed location of SysCP vhost file as to not interfere with Apache's vhost file.

Changed MASTER_SITES to correct URLs.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
